title: How Nice
description: How Nice is a Modpack focused on bringing a nice enjoyable and visually positive experience.
body:
![b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/022928e6e42154a96176204d6eedd964db3900a0.png)
### ЁЯСЛ Oh, How Nice IS That?
Experience the perfect blend of quality of life and performance improvements.ЁЯМ╖ Designed to get the most FPS out of your computer while enhancing your overall gameplay experience, this modpack ensures that every moment in Minecraft is smoother and more enjoyable.тЬи Whether you have a high-end gaming rig or a modest setup, How Nice delivers both performance and quality.ЁЯТУ
![b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/022928e6e42154a96176204d6eedd964db3900a0.png)

### ЁЯФз Compatibility
I made this modpack to increase performance and improve the quality of life while maintaining that Minecraft experience. You can add other mods to the pack if you wish.

Tested In The Modrinth App
| Supported Versions| Fabric| Quilt |Forge| Neoforge|
|-------------------|:------|:------|:----|:--------|
| Below 1.20        |    тЭМ|     тЭМ|   тЭМ|      тЭМ|
| 1.20.x            |    ЁЯЯв|     тЭМ|   тЭМ|      тЭМ|
| 1.21.x            |    ЁЯЯв|     тЭМ|   тЭМ|      тЭМ|

тЬЕ= Yes, It Is Actively Being Updated On Modrinth

тЭМ= There Is No Support For This Version

ЁЯЯв= No New Updates Of This Version Will Come Out On Modrinth

![b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/022928e6e42154a96176204d6eedd964db3900a0.png)

### тЪЩя╕П How Fast Does This Modpack Update? 
I commit to keeping How Nice up-to-date. I roll out updates as soon as possible to ensure you always have the best performance and quality of life improvements. We release versions that offer the highest performance and enhancements within a few days of any major updates.

![b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/022928e6e42154a96176204d6eedd964db3900a0.png)

### ЁЯРЫ Support or Bugs? 
If you need help, have questions, or encounter any bugs, IтАЩm here for you. Join the How Nice Discord server, where I am ready to assist you with any issues, answer your questions, and provide general support. IтАЩm always eager to help and improve your experience.

![b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/022928e6e42154a96176204d6eedd964db3900a0.png)
![The Official Banner For How Nice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88f14e5c48d70a3d2726aeabd20129d7f750cde5.png)
![b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/022928e6e42154a96176204d6eedd964db3900a0.png)

<details>
<summary>Versioning</summary>

Format:

~~```W```.```X```.```Y```.```Z```~~

~~New~~

- ~~```W```: **MAJOR** version (Almsot never going to change)~~
- ~~```X```: Minecraft version~~
- ~~```Y```: Moderate Version (modpack exclusive changes. a config tweak/change)~~
- ~~```Z```: Minor version (Mod updates)~~

Old
- ```X```: **MAJOR** version (Not likely to change)
- ```Y```: Minecraft version (Will change frequently)
- ```Z```: Minor version (Mod updates)

</details>
